seoTitle: Claymore vs Clear Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Claymore and Clear Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Claymore vs Clear Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Claymore and Clear Range.
heading: Claymore vs Clear Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Claymore, New South Wales and Clear Range, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clear Range has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Claymore (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Claymore or Clear Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Claymore has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Clear Range scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Claymore scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Clear Range scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Claymore or Clear Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clear Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
